source: Raw stdout printed by Seq2SeqTrainer.train() at the end of Phase B's codet5-base training run (max_length=256). HuggingFace's Trainer logs this summary to the console but does not persist it into trainer_state.json (verified: see trainer_state.json in this same folder, whose log_history has no train_runtime entry). Captured manually from the Colab cell output since it is not written to any file by the training script itself.
